LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNABLE TO PROOF ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN UNDER AGUILAR V ATLANTIC RICHFILED CO. (2001) 25 CAL. 4TH 826. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THEREFORE HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PROVE THEIR CASE OF CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE SPOLIATION ARGUMENT OR FAILURE TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE. BECAUSE TTHE BURDEN DID NOT SHIFT, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO EVIDENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DESIRES EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND PREPARE A SIGLE DOCUMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSTION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY AND LINES FOR THE COURT TO RULE. THIS PLEADING IS TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN 14 DAYS AND THE PARTIES AR TO ADVISE THE CLERK THAT A RULING IS DESIRED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNABLE TO PROOF ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN UNDER AGUILAR V ATLANTIC RICHFILED CO. (2001) 25 CAL. 4TH 826. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THEREFORE HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PROVE THEIR CASE OF CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE SPOLIATION ARGUMENT OR FAILURE TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE. BECAUSE TTHE BURDEN DID NOT SHIFT, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO EVIDENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DESIRES EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND PREPARE A SIGLE DOCUMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSTION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY AND LINES FOR THE COURT TO RULE. THIS PLEADING IS TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN 14 DAYS AND THE PARTIES AR TO ADVISE THE CLERK THAT A RULING IS DESIRED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Williams, Esq. and Emily Sullivan of Shook, Hardy & Bacon, 816-474-6550 for defendant and moving party Tyco Fire Products
Gavin Munter, Esq. of Elie & Assoc., 916-638-6610 for plaintiff and opposing party Travelers Indemnity Co.

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNABLE TO PROOF ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN UNDER AGUILAR V ATLANTIC RICHFILED CO. (2001) 25 CAL. 4TH 826. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THEREFORE HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PROVE THEIR CASE OF CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE SPOLIATION ARGUMENT OR FAILURE TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE. BECAUSE TTHE BURDEN DID NOT SHIFT, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO EVIDENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DESIRES EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND PREPARE A SIGLE DOCUMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSTION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY AND LINES FOR THE COURT TO RULE. THIS PLEADING IS TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN 14 DAYS AND THE PARTIES AR TO ADVISE THE CLERK THAT A RULING IS DESIRED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/VC)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Williams, Esq. and Emily Sullivan of Shook, Hardy & Bacon, 816-474-6550 for defendant and moving party Tyco Fire Products
Gavin Munter, Esq. of Elie & Assoc., 916-638-6610 for plaintiff and opposing party Travelers Indemnity Co.

Ruling:
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT TYCO FIRE PRODUCTS, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. THIS IS A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DEFENDANT MUST DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF'S ARE UNABLE TO PROOF ANY OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN UNDER AGUILAR V ATLANTIC RICHFILED CO. (2001) 25 CAL. 4TH 826. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SERVED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND THEREFORE HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PROVE THEIR CASE OF CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THE SPOLIATION ARGUMENT OR FAILURE TO PRESERVE EVIDENCE. BECAUSE TTHE BURDEN DID NOT SHIFT, THE COURT NEED NOT RULE ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTONS TO EVIDENCE. IF THE DEFENDANT DESIRES EVIDENTIARY RULINGS, PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND PREPARE A SIGLE DOCUMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSTION, DEFENDANT'S REPLY AND LINES FOR THE COURT TO RULE. THIS PLEADING IS TO BE SUBMITTED WITHIN 14 DAYS AND THE PARTIES AR TO ADVISE THE CLERK THAT A RULING IS DESIRED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/VC)
